title: Techtonic
description: Techtonic is a Tech/RPG pack, based around a few bigger mods, and smaller mods to add spice.
body:
# Techtonic

Techtonic is a Gregtech and Create centered pack, with bits of RPG added into the mix. Enjoy using mods like Greg Tech, Create, and Botania, while also using other mods like Better Combat, and Cold Sweat. 

# Special Thanks
All credits will be listed here as required.

### Royal Variations
Special thanks to Royal Variations for letting us use their mod in our modpack! Any issues in the pack is a result of us, do not report any issues to them!
### Loot Journal
Special thanks to Loot Journal for letting us use their mod in our modpack! Any issues in the pack is a result of us, do not report any issues to them!
### Fabled Weaponry
Special thanks to Fabled Weaponry for letting us use their mod in our modpack! Any issues in the pack is a result of us, do not report any issues to them!
### Compressium
Special thanks to Compressium for letting us use their mod in our modpack! Any issues in the pack is a result of us, do not report any issues to them!
### Better Fog
Special thanks to Better Fog for letting us use their mod in our modpack! Any issues in the pack is a result of us, do not report any issues to them!
### Nameless Trinkets
Special thanks to Nameless Trinkets for letting us use their mod in our modpack! Any issues in the pack is a result of us, do not report any issues to them!
### Passive Skill Tree
Special thanks to Passive Skill Tree for letting us use their mod in our modpack! Any issues in the pack is a result of us, do not report any issues to them!
### Gnumus Settlement
Special thanks to Gnumus Settlement for letting us use their mod in our modpack! Any issues in the pack is a result of us, do not report any issues to them!
### Productive Bees
Special thanks to Productive Bees for letting us use their mod in our modpack! Any issues in the pack is a result of us, do not report any issues to them!
